overview: Inner Compass Help is a comprehensive, globally accessible wellness platform supporting individuals with physical and mental health challenges. It offers journaling, mood and habit tracking, cycle tracking with inclusive onboarding, sleep and water tracking, goal setting, breathing exercises, self-assessment tools, emergency safety planning, and a rich resources library — all behind secure Internet Identity login with customizable themes and full accessibility controls.
features: Internet Identity login with user accounts synced across devices
Inclusive onboarding that asks about periods before showing the cycle tracker
Dashboard with daily affirmations and theme switcher (cloud, ocean, sunset, night)
Mood tracking with emoji/score and charts
Habit tracking with streaks and milestone rewards
Cycle tracker for users who opt in
Resources page with global crisis hotlines
Font size controls and high contrast accessibility modes
